_comment: Template only. Claude Code loads .mcp.json, NOT this file. To enable a server, copy its entry into .mcp.json's mcpServers, then UNCOMMENT the matching mcp__ line in the relevant agent's tools list. Add only what you actually use. Versions are pinned for reproducibility — pin whatever you add likewise. NOTE: semgrep-mcp / osv-mcp ship via their own ecosystems (not npm), so adjust the runner for those rather than relying on npx.
